headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Align Technology, Raises Price Target to $188
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Erin Wright   maintains Align Technology (NASDAQ:ALGN) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $169 to $188.
